page.title: Work Shifts
page.subtitle: Operational schedule authority for shift windows, subjects, and resources.
page.placeholder: Work Schedule is implemented as real Wave 6 routes.

relatedModes.by-resource: Related work shifts by studio resource

my.title: My Work Shifts
my.subtitle: Read-only view of your own scheduled work shifts.

team.title: Team Work Shifts
team.subtitle: Read-only schedule visibility for managed team members.

globalOps.subtitle: Admin/Ops-owned official work shifts and schedule request approval queue.

actions.historicalArchiveEligible: Historical active shift can be archived from detail

states.emptyMessage: Adjust filters or create a work shift.

create.title: Create work shift
create.subtitle: Create one scheduled work shift with one subject identity.

reassignSubject.title: Reassign subject
reassignSubject.subtitle: Replace the work shift subject identity.

replaceResources.title: Replace resources
replaceResources.subtitle: Send the full replacement studio resource set.

task.title: Schedule work shift
task.description: Use this guided form for normal scheduling.
task.authorityNote: Times are shown in Vietnam time ({{timezone}}, {{offset}}). When you save, the system checks whether you can make the change, whether the selected person or group can be scheduled, studio resources, and overlapping shifts. Personal, team, and department ranges are only used when scheduling an Employment Profile.
task.generatedShiftCode: Shift code will be generated after save.
task.generatedShiftCodeValue: Generated by the system after save
task.generatedShiftCodeHelp: You do not need to enter this code.
task.datetimeHelp: Choose the date and time in Vietnam time. Please check the time again in the review step before saving.
task.employmentScopeHelp: Employment Profile subjects may use everyone, self, team, or department ranges. The system checks final access when you save.
task.globalScopeHelp: Talent and Talent Group subjects are scheduled for everyone in this workflow.
task.externalRefHelp: Use this only when the shift needs to link to a ticket, spreadsheet, document, or code from another system. It can be left blank.
task.backendAuthorityWarning: When you save, the system checks access, the selected person or group, studio resources, shift status, and overlapping shifts. This workflow only sends the scheduling details shown above.

validation.localDateTime: Choose both the date and time in Vietnam time.

placeholders.generatedShiftCode: Leave blank to let the system generate it

validation.invalidScope: Use a supported Work Schedule scope.
validation.nonGlobalEmploymentProfileOnly: Non-global Work Schedule scope is only valid for Employment Profile subjects.

feedback.submitFailed: Schedule request could not be submitted.

page.title: Work Patterns
page.subtitle: Roster pattern definitions for Vietnam local working days and times.

form.activeStructuralReadOnly: Active patterns only allow name, description, and external reference edits.

states.emptyMessage: Adjust filters or create a work pattern.
states.loadErrorTitle: Work patterns could not be loaded
states.loadErrorMessage: The system rejected or did not return work pattern data.

create.title: Create work pattern
create.subtitle: Define working days, start time, and duration. The system generates the pattern code after save.

edit.title: Edit work pattern
edit.subtitle: Draft patterns allow schedule and metadata edits.
edit.activeSubtitle: Active patterns only allow metadata edits.

validation.patternCode: Use uppercase letters, numbers, and underscores.
validation.time: Use a supported local time and duration.
validation.sameDay: The work pattern must finish within the same day.
validation.workingDays: Choose at least one working day.

page.title: Holiday Calendars
page.subtitle: Global roster-generation calendars that suppress standard generated shifts on active holiday and off-day entries.

detail.pageSubtitle: Global roster-generation calendar detail. This is not employee leave, absence, attendance, or payroll policy.

entries.title: Entries
entries.description: Active date-only holiday and off-day entries suppress standard generated roster shifts. They do not record employee leave, sickness, absence, attendance, or payroll policy.
entries.subtitle: No time or timezone is collected for calendar entries.
entries.name: Name
entries.confirmRemove: Remove this entry from active use? The record is kept as removed.

create.title: Create holiday calendar
create.subtitle: Create a global roster-generation calendar. The system generates the calendar code after save.

validation.calendarCode: Use uppercase letters, numbers, and underscores.
validation.duplicate: A holiday calendar with this code already exists.
validation.duplicateDate: An active entry already exists for this date.

feedback.entryRemoved: Holiday entry removed from active use.

states.emptyMessage: Adjust filters or create a holiday calendar.
states.loadErrorTitle: Holiday calendars could not be loaded
states.loadErrorMessage: The system rejected or did not return holiday calendar data.

page.title: Monthly Rosters
page.subtitle: Draft roster setup for exact Org Unit or Talent Group monthly schedules.

detail.readOnlyDraftSetup: Draft setup is read-only unless the roster is in Draft status.
detail.structuralLock: This draft already has exceptions. Remove the exceptions before changing the month, department, pattern, or holiday calendar.

copy.readOnly: Preview does not create work shifts.
copy.noPublish: Use the publish review after checking this preview.

exclusionReasons.MISSING_LINKED_EMPLOYMENT_PROFILE: Talent is not linked to an Employment Profile
exclusionReasons.EMPLOYMENT_PROFILE_NOT_FOUND: Linked Employment Profile was not found
exclusionReasons.EMPLOYMENT_PROFILE_INACTIVE: Linked Employment Profile is not active
exclusionReasons.DUPLICATE_EMPLOYMENT_PROFILE: Employment Profile already included through another member

blockers.SUBJECT_OVERLAP: This row overlaps an existing active Work Shift.

reason.workingToOff: Standard working day marked as off

freshness.notPreviewed: Preview has not been saved yet

states.loadErrorTitle: Roster preview could not be loaded
states.loadErrorMessage: The system rejected or did not return roster preview data.
states.emptyRows: No preview rows match the current filters.

copy.createShifts: The system will create work shifts from this roster.
copy.noUndo: Publishing cannot be undone from this screen.

disabledReasons.notDraft: Only Draft rosters can be published.
disabledReasons.error: Preview must load successfully before publishing.
disabledReasons.hashUnavailable: Preview hash is unavailable. Refresh preview before publishing.
disabledReasons.stale: Preview is out of date. Refresh preview before publishing.

confirmation.title: Confirm publish
confirmation.copy: Real Work Shifts will be created for the publishable preview rows.

states.alreadyPublished: This roster is already published. Repeating publish does not create duplicate Work Shifts.
states.unavailable: Publish is unavailable for this roster status.

errors.title: Publish could not be completed
errors.stalePreview: Preview is out of date. Refresh preview before publishing.
errors.unauthorized: Your session is not authorized to publish this roster.
errors.forbidden: You do not have permission or department access to publish this roster.
errors.validation: The system rejected the publish request. Check the preview and roster status.
errors.conflict: The roster changed or has conflicts. Refresh preview before publishing.
errors.generic: The publish request could not be completed.

generated.title: Generated Work Shifts
generated.copy: Generated Work Shifts are normal Work Shifts with read-only monthly roster source metadata.

states.unavailable: Generated Work Shifts are available after publish.

fields.employeeSearch: Search active employees in this department
fields.title: Title

copy.draftOnly: Draft rosters allow adding, editing, and removing pre-publish exceptions.
copy.readOnly: This roster is not a draft. Exceptions are read-only.
copy.previewDeferred: Exception changes are reflected in the read-only roster preview.
copy.workingToOffNoTime: This exception marks an existing standard working day as off and does not send time fields.
copy.endCalculated: Calculated by the system after save.

summary.workingToOff: Standard working day marked as off
summary.addSpecialShift: Extra shift at {{startLocalTime}} for {{workingMinutes}} working minutes

mutations.subtitle: Backend validates the month, exact department employee, standard candidate, and conflicts.

validation.dateInMonth: Choose a date inside the roster month.
validation.positiveMinutes: Enter a positive whole number of minutes.
validation.nonNegativeMinutes: Enter zero or a positive whole number of minutes.
validation.noStandardCandidate: No standard roster candidate exists for this exception.
validation.conflict: This exception conflicts with another roster exception or shift.
validation.inactiveEmploymentProfile: Choose an active Employment Profile in the roster department.
validation.outsideDepartment: Choose an Employment Profile in the roster department.
validation.duplicate: This exception duplicates an existing roster exception.

feedback.removed: Roster exception removed from the draft.

confirm.remove: Remove this exception from the draft? Removed exceptions no longer affect preview.

create.title: Create monthly roster draft
create.subtitle: Create one exact-department roster draft for a YYYY-MM month. The system generates the roster code after save.

edit.title: Edit monthly roster draft
edit.subtitle: Draft rosters allow setup and metadata edits until structural fields are locked by exceptions.

validation.rosterCode: Use uppercase letters, numbers, and underscores.
validation.planningWindow: Choose the current month or one of the next two months.
validation.invalidScope: Use Global or Department roster access.
validation.duplicateDepartmentMonth: A roster already exists for this department and month.
validation.activeExceptionsStructuralLock: Remove active exceptions before changing the month, department, pattern, or holiday calendar.

states.emptyMessage: Adjust filters or create a monthly roster draft.
states.loadErrorTitle: Monthly rosters could not be loaded
states.loadErrorMessage: The system rejected or did not return monthly roster data.

copy.setupInvariants: Choose one active Org Unit or Talent Group target. Descendants and nested groups are not included. Global is access authority, not a company-wide roster target. The roster targets active Employment Profiles, uses a global roster-generation Holiday Calendar, and keeps timezone Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh.
